titleStmt.title: SII 37.328: original edition by S. Nagarjuna and K. Munirathnam
No. 328. (A.R. No. B 435 of 1940-41.) Kibilē-Sugumañchipalle, Jammalamaḍugu Taluk, Cuddapah District.

summary.p: Slab in front of the Śiva temple.
This is dated Śaka 1489, Siddhārthi, Jyēshṭha ba. 1, Irregular.

It registers the remission of taxes such as pannu, Kāṇike, Kaṭṇam, Veṭivēmula, Dommaripannu and Siddhāyam etc., due from the barbers in the Avuku-sīma, by mahāmaṇḍalēśvara Rāmarāju Tirumalarājayyadēva mahārāju.
[Published in Inscriptions of Andhra Pradesh: Cuddapah District, Part II, No. 257.]

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrī ja
yābhyudaya śālivā
hana śakavarṣaṁbulu 1489
Agunēṭi sidhārti
saṁvatsara jēṣṭha ba 1 lu . śrīmadrā
jādhirāja rājaparamēśvara śrīvīra
pratāpa śrī vīra sadāsivarāya dēvamahā
rāyalugāru vijayanagaramaṁddu va
jrasiṁhāsanārūḍhulai pṛthvi sāṁbrājya
mu śēyucuṁḍaṁgānu śrī rmamahāmaṁ
ḍalēśvara rāmarāju tirumala rājayya dē
va mahārājuluṁgāru Avukusīma maṁ
gaḷavōjulaku Icina dharma śāsana kramame
ṭlaṁnnanu śrī sadāsivadēva mahārāyalugāru
mā nāyaṁkaramaṁdu maṁgaḷa koṁḍōju rāya siṁ
hvāsanānaku cellē simalō maṁgaḷa vōjari kānaku
Icē paṁnnu kānike kaṭṇaṁ mākuṁnnu si
dhāyaṁ veṭivēmulu sarvamānyaṁgānu Iccina dharma
śāsanaṁ . naccēprakārānu māku cellē Avuku sīmalō
maṁgaḷavōjulaku kāṇikakaṭṇaṁ veṭi vēmulu dommari
paṁnnu sidāyaṁ pannu saha sarvvamānyaṁgānu
maṁgaḷavōjulaku kāṇika kaṭṇaṁ veṭi vēmula dommari
paṁnnu sidāyaṁ pannu saha sarvvamānyaṁgānu
yistimi . Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyigānu Istimi .
yiṁduku yavaru tappinānu konnānu tama ta
ma tallitaṁḍḍila vāraṇāsilōnu vadhiṁcina pāpā
na bōvuvāru gaṁgāvatilōnu gōvu brāhma
vadhiṁccina pāpāna bōvuvāru
surānu sēviṁccina pāpāna bō
vuvāru śrī śrī śrīṁ jēyunu . . Across the slab on the left margins are the two lines of writing, rather indistinct.
Digital edition of SII 37.328 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
